title: Physical Falling Trees
description:
Cut down all the trees! 
Down with the floating trees!
body:
## 📖 About
So, this datapack really adds physical falling trees! Now, with any felled tree, it will try to fall, causing damage to all living entities in its path.

### Features:
- Trees fall to the heavier side, but if the center of gravity is in the center of the tree axis, then the tree falls towards the player.
  - The heavier side is calculated by the relative weight for the cardinal directions. The deforming blocks have 1, all the others have 3.
- The tree causes damage depending on it's falling speed.
- If there are bees in the nest of a cut tree, they will get angry at you.
- When the tree has fallen, the model will be lying for half a second before transforming into real blocks. But if a tree has been falling for less than half a second after being cut down, then it transforms instantly.

#
